title: Gorp's World
description: Wake up kiddo, it's time for Gorp! You're in his world now...
body:
_**This mod will be on hiatus while I work on Update 10 (it's real big)**_
# **Welcome to Gorp's World!**

![Gorp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dd0647d720852e45674e7e08a07467348574ef0.png)

In this mod you will find **Gorp**, a green, lovable, bean-shaped creature.
Despite his handsome looks, Gorp is not food.
Instead, he is a multi-purpose consumable made of biological matter.
This means Gorp is alive!

![Gorp Sprout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed8605023f8f9c8af121ecf820b35cd83d04be2f_0.webp)

**Gorp Sprouts** generate in the overworld and are your ticket into the world of Gorp.
When a Gorp Sprout is destroyed, it will drop Gorp Seeds.

![Gorp Seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5114ca848c6edb60574afee1ba704ebb7c1f431f_0.webp)

**Gorp Seeds** can be planted on farmland to grow into Gorp Plants. 

![Gorp Plant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/329ad2a3196ddf0977c44239b5d220c1e1d5cf2a.png)

**Gorp Plants** when harvested will drop an assortment of Gorps and Gorp Seeds.
He's chilling in a hammock btw.

![Bitten Gorp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7d14dafeb446c1c87586884c8e62ab0d0b0bd6d.png)

You need permission from a Gorp to create a **Bitten Gorp**.
They are commonly used in Gorp crafting.
Bitten Gorps can also be eaten and give more hunger points than a regular Gorp.

![Gorp Altar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36bf8c2fd3b31a5ef6dc1305b738be31024ab46c.png)

The **Gorp Altar** allows you to communicate with Gorp if you place one on the mantle.
It's very ancient technology.

![Gorp Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/953c17072d1be5922b91b9935ef025e22873398b.png)

Gorp Hammer
When you hit a mob with the **Gorp Hammer**, you and your target will be afflicted with Jorping which makes you jorp.

![Jorping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e03b25518924200004adc1c8a2b1b60bae562a39_0.webp)

It makes you jorp.
**Jorping** can be useful for getting to tall, hard to reach areas.
It can be also used to negate fall damage in certain cases.

![Jorp Juice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59ba44f58191552ade74ffba25b6b8a0f8835d37_0.webp)

Smelting a Bitten Gorp produces **Jorp Juice**. Upon consumption the player will jorp.
Designed as a replacement for water bucket MLGing with a similar learning curve.

![Gorp Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7b88b30fd2f590826c2ab7b0d988c00434e619c.png)

Hold right-click to charge your **Gorp Spear** and it will launch you in the direction you are looking.
Can be used while flying with elytra to increase your velocity.
Please be mindful of fall damage. Use Jorp Juice if you must.

![Plurge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ebc252158364aa808dfeb47becb0c69765751f6.png)

A new enchantment, **Plurge**, is added.
It can be applied to swords and the Gorp Hammer.

When an entity is killed with Plurge the player is given an Iron-H Damage effect.

Plurge is the power of the Aggrussel race, the natural born enemy of Gorp.
They are angry and aggressive beasts who wish to harm any Gorp they come across.

![Gorp Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d3317018c6607d7c15a336d93c1dc9c17bf2940.png)

**Gorp Staff**
Gives you the power to push mobs away from you with a single right-click!
Phantoms are intrinsically afraid of Gorp's teeth.


---


While this is all Gorp's World has to offer for now, new features will be added in the future!
Remember to love and cherish Gorp!

![March of the Gorp painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1be2766daa260e3a91116c12c2684cbb8278918e.png)

Gorp Mod Dev <3
